get.jsonData:
[
  {
    "q": "New York",
    "dt": "2023-01-01",
    "lang": "en",
    "expected_statusCode": 200,
    "scenario": "Test a valid request with proper query params"
  },
  {
    "q": "",
    "dt": "2023-01-01",
    "lang": "en",
    "expected_statusCode": 400,
    "scenario": "Test request with missing required 'q' query param"
  },
  {
    "q": "New York",
    "dt": "2023-01-01",
    "lang": "en",
    "expected_statusCode": 401,
    "scenario": "Test request with invalid API key"
  },
  {
    "q": "New York",
    "dt": "2023-01-01",
    "lang": "en",
    "expected_statusCode": 403,
    "scenario": "Test request with API key that exceeded quota"
  },
  {
    "q": "New York",
    "dt": "invalid-date",
    "lang": "en",
    "expected_statusCode": 400,
    "scenario": "Test request with 'dt' query param in invalid date format"
  }
]
